author.description:
Official account of the Justice Department 🇺🇸 
DOJ Privacy Policy: https://t.co/2J3w9HbAuR

tweets.text:
Minnesota Health Care Fraud Takedown Results in Charges Against 15 Defendants for Over $90M in Fraud: @DOJFraudDiv announces expansion of Health Care Fraud Section to investigate Medicaid fraud nationwide

“Today, we are holding scammers accountable who ripped off the American taxpayer and harmed those deserving legitimate assistance from these programs,” said Acting Attorney General @DAGToddBlanche. “These alleged con artists stole taxpayer dollars while providing substandard care for children and abandoning at least one Medicaid recipient as they passed away. The DOJ Fraud Division, along with the @WHFraudTF, will dismantle illegal schemes from coast-to-coast, just as they did today in Minnesota. This is just the tip of the iceberg.”

🔗: https://t.co/fl5YUf7Nhw
tweets.text_resolved:

The DOJ Fraud Division, along with the @WHFraudTF, will dismantle illegal schemes from coast-to-coast, just as they did today in Minnesota. This is just the tip of the iceberg.”

🔗: https://www.justice.gov/opa/pr/minnesota-health-care-fraud-takedown-results-charges-against-15-defendants-over-90m-fraud

author.description:
Official account of the Justice Department 🇺🇸 
DOJ Privacy Policy: https://t.co/2J3w9HbAuR

tweets.text:
ICYMI: Yesterday, Carmen Mercedes Lineberger, 62, of Port St. Lucie, was indicted in federal court for two counts of theft of government money or property, valued less than $1,000.00; destruction, alteration, or falsification of records in federal investigations; and concealment, removal, or mutilation of public records. 

As alleged in the indictment, the defendant concealed her actions by saving electronic copies of the government records in question under the misleading files names “chocolate cake recipe” and “bundt cake recipe” before electronically transmitting those records to her personal email accounts.

Great work @USAO_NDFL, @FBI, and @JusticeOIG!

Read more here: https://t.co/Lsy0i9FE8b
tweets.text_resolved:
ICYMI: Yesterday, Carmen Mercedes Lineberger, 62, of Port St. Lucie, was indicted in federal court for two counts of theft of government money or property, valued less than $1,000.00; destruction, alteration, or falsification of records in federal investigations; and concealment, removal, or mutilation of public records. 

As alleged in the indictment, the defendant concealed her actions by saving electronic copies of the government records in question under the misleading files names “chocolate cake recipe” and “bundt cake recipe” before electronically transmitting those records to her personal email accounts.

Great work @USAO_NDFL, @FBI, and @JusticeOIG!

Read more here: https://www.justice.gov/usao-ndfl/pr/former-doj-attorney-indicted-concealment-theft-government-records
